6:["$","div",null,{"className":"max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"pt-6 gap-1","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":"$6:props:children:0:props:children:props:children:props:children:1:props:children:0:props:iconNode","className":"lucide-chevron-right text-stone-300 mb-10","children":[["$","h1",null,{"className":"text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 leading-tight mb-5","style":{"fontFamily":"'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif"},"children":"Home Office Decor Ideas: How to Design a Space That Motivates You"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"flex flex-wrap items-center gap-4 text-sm text-stone-400","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"href":"/authors/mia-collins","className":"flex items-center gap-2 group","children":[["$","img",null,{"src":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1494790108377-be9c29b29330?w=400&h=400&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","alt":"Mia Collins","className":"w-8 h-8 rounded-full object-cover object-top"}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-200 text-sm group-hover:text-orange-600 transition-colors","children":"Mia Collins"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xs text-stone-400","children":"Workspace Designer"}]]}]]}],["$","span",null,{"className":"flex items-center gap-1","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 6v6l4 2","key":"mmk7yg"}]],"className":"lucide-clock","size":13}]," ","7 min read"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"December 20, 2025"}]]}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-10 pb-16","children":[["$","article",null,{"className":"lg:col-span-2","children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xl text-stone-600 leading-relaxed mb-10 font-medium pl-4 border-l-4 border-orange-500","children":"A workspace you enjoy looking at is one you will actually use. This guide covers the design principles, colour choices, and personal touches that make a home office feel professional and inspiring without becoming cluttered."}],["$","div",null,{"className":"prose","children":[["$","h2","0",{"id":"why-aesthetics-are-a-productivity-tool","children":"Why Aesthetics Are a Productivity Tool"}],["$","p","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A well-designed workspace is not vanity. The environment you inhabit affects your mood, your motivation, and the quality of your thinking in ways that are consistent and measurable."}}],["$","p","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Research in environmental psychology consistently finds that people in well-designed spaces report higher wellbeing, higher engagement, and better performance on cognitive tasks. The mechanism is partly psychological (you feel like a professional in a professional-looking space) and partly neurological (visual clutter and poor lighting directly impair cognitive function)."}}],"$L9","$La","$Lb","$Lc","$Ld","$Le","$Lf","$L10","$L11","$L12","$L13","$L14","$L15","$L16","$L17","$L18","$L19","$L1a","$L1b","$L1c","$L1d","$L1e","$L1f","$L20","$L21"]}],"$L22","$L23","$L24"]}],"$L25"]}]]}]
7:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js","async":true}]
8:["$","$L26",null,{"children":["$","$27",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@28"}]}]
9:["$","p","3",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"This guide covers the design decisions that have the most impact."}}]
a:["$","h2","4",{"id":"the-colour-foundation","children":"The Colour Foundation"}]
b:["$","p","5",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Colour temperature and saturation affect mood and cognitive performance differently:"}}]
c:["$","p","6",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Neutral base tones</strong> (warm whites, soft greys, stone tones) are the best foundation for a workspace. They recede visually, reduce distraction, and make the space feel calm and spacious. The overwhelming majority of high-functioning workspaces use neutrals as the primary colour."}}]
d:["$","p","7",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Accent colours</strong> add personality without overwhelm. One deliberate accent — an orange desk lamp, a green plant, a warm wood desktop — is more effective than multiple competing colours."}}]
e:["$","p","8",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Avoid</strong>: saturated colours on large surfaces (walls, desk surface). Blue and green in small amounts increase creativity and calm. Red in any significant quantity increases stress and heart rate."}}]
f:["$","p","9",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The simplest starting point: white or warm grey walls, natural wood or white desk surface, one accent through a lamp or accessory."}}]
10:["$","h2","10",{"id":"plants-the-easiest-upgrade","children":"Plants: The Easiest Upgrade"}]
11:["$","p","11",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A single plant does more for a workspace than almost any other decorative element. The reasons are practical:"}}]
12:["$","ul","12",{"children":[["$","li","0",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Plants improve air quality marginally (mostly psychological, but real)"}}],["$","li","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Green is associated with reduced stress in multiple studies"}}],["$","li","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A living element in the workspace signals a different quality of environment than a purely functional one"}}]]}]
13:["$","p","13",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The best options for home offices: pothos (extremely low maintenance, tolerates low light), snake plant (thrives on neglect), ZZ plant (tolerates dry air and irregular watering). One plant at desk height or above is sufficient."}}]
14:["$","h2","14",{"id":"wall-space-intentional-not-busy","children":"Wall Space: Intentional Not Busy"}]
15:["$","p","15",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The wall behind your desk — visible in every video call and in your peripheral vision all day — has a significant aesthetic impact."}}]
16:["$","p","16",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Good options</strong>:"}}]
17:["$","ul","17",{"children":[["$","li","0",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A single piece of art or photography that means something to you"}}],["$","li","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A simple shelf with a few well-chosen objects"}}],["$","li","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A clean, painted wall in a good colour — nothing beats simplicity"}}]]}]
18:["$","p","18",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Avoid</strong>: gallery walls behind your desk. What looks curated in photos becomes visual noise in practice."}}]
19:["$","h2","19",{"id":"desk-surface-discipline","children":"Desk Surface Discipline"}]
1a:["$","p","20",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The most important aesthetic decision is what lives on your desk surface. A desk pad (leather or felt) provides a visual boundary and makes the entire surface look intentional. Within that boundary: only what you use every day."}}]
1b:["$","p","21",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"One notebook. One pen. One plant or small object. Your monitor and keyboard. Everything else goes in a drawer or leaves the room."}}]
1c:["$","h2","22",{"id":"lighting-as-decor","children":"Lighting as Decor"}]
1d:["$","p","23",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Lighting is both functional and aesthetic. A good desk lamp with a sculptural form doubles as a decorative object. Warm-toned LED strips behind the monitor create a professional look that also reduces eye strain."}}]
1e:["$","p","24",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Avoid harsh overhead lighting as your only source. Layered lighting — ambient plus task — makes a space feel considered rather than institutional."}}]
1f:["$","h2","25",{"id":"cable-visibility","children":"Cable Visibility"}]
20:["$","p","26",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Visible cables are the single greatest enemy of a good-looking workspace. No amount of thoughtful decoration compensates for a nest of cables at the front of the desk. A cable tray under the desk, wireless keyboard and mouse, and a USB-C monitor that reduces connections to one cable transforms the visual immediately."}}]
21:["$","p","27",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"For cable management specifics, see our <a href=\"/blog/cable-management-desk-guide\" class=\"text-orange-600 dark:text-orange-400 hover:underline font-medium\">desk cable management guide</a>."}}]
22:["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-10 pt-8 border-t border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-sm font-medium text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400","children":"Topic:"}],["$","$L3",null,{"href":"/blog?category=Workspace","className":"text-sm font-semibold px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","design"]}],["$","$L3","inspiration",{"href":"/blog/tag/inspiration","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","inspiration"]}],["$","$L3","organization",{"href":"/blog/tag/organization","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 23:["$","$L29",null,{"title":"Home Office Decor Ideas: How to Design a Space That Motivates You","slug":"home-office-decor-ideas"}]
24:["$","div",null,{"className":"print:hidden","children":["$","$L2a",null,{}]}]
25:["$","aside",null,{"className":"space-y-5 print:hidden","children":[["$","$L2b",null,{"items":[{"id":"why-aesthetics-are-a-productivity-tool","text":"Why Aesthetics Are a Productivity Tool","level":2},{"id":"the-colour-foundation","text":"The Colour Foundation","level":2},{"id":"plants-the-easiest-upgrade","text":"Plants: The Easiest Upgrade","level":2},{"id":"wall-space-intentional-not-busy","text":"Wall Space: Intentional Not Busy","level":2},{"id":"desk-surface-discipline","text":"Desk Surface Discipline","level":2},{"id":"lighting-as-decor","text":"Lighting as Decor","level":2},{"id":"cable-visibility","text":"Cable Visibility","level":2}]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"bg-white dark:bg-stone-900 rounded-2xl p-6 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800","children":[["$","img",null,{"src":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1494790108377-be9c29b29330?w=400&h=400&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","alt":"Mia Collins","className":"w-14 h-14 rounded-2xl object-cover object-top mb-4"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"font-bold text-lg text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-0.5","style":{"fontFamily":"'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif"},"children":"Mia Collins"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-sm text-orange-500 font-medium mb-3","children":"Workspace Designer"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-sm text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400 leading-relaxed mb-4","children":"A decade designing ergonomic workspaces for remote teams. 2c:["$","$L3",null,{"href":"/contact","className":"inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-sm font-semibold px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-white bg-orange-500 hover:bg-orange-600 transition-colors","children":["Get in touch ",["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"M7 7h10v10","key":"1tivn9"}],["path",{"d":"M7 17 17 7","key":"1vkiza"}]],"className":"lucide-arrow-up-right","size":14}]]}]
